data.title: Hulic Co., Ltd. Completes Tender Offer for Canadian Solar Infrastructure Fund Units
data.description:
An announcement from Canadian Solar Infrastructure Fund.Inc. ( (JP:9284) ) is now available.

data.title: Ionic Rare Earths Limited Announces Quotation of New Securities on ASX
data.description:
Ionic Rare Earths Limited ( (AU:IXR) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Ionic Rare Earths Limited announced the quotation of 7,256,537 ordinary fully paid securities on the Australian Securities Exchange (ASX). This move is part of previously announced transactions and is expected to enhance the company’s liquidity and market presence, potentially benefiting stakeholders by increasing the accessibility and attractiveness of the company’s shares.

More about Ionic Rare Earths Limited

Ionic Rare Earths Limited operates in the mining industry, focusing on the extraction and development of rare earth elements. These elements are critical for various high-tech applications, including electronics, renewable energy, and defense sectors.

data.title: Medicover’s Emission Reduction Targets Validated by SBTi
data.description:
Medicover AB ( ($SE:MCOV.B) ) has issued an update.

Medicover AB has had its greenhouse gas emissions reduction targets validated by the Science Based Targets Initiative (SBTi). The company aims to significantly reduce its scope 1, 2, and 3 emissions by 2030 and 2050, aligning with its goal of achieving net zero emissions by 2050. This commitment underscores Medicover’s dedication to sustainability while expanding its healthcare services.

The most recent analyst rating on ($SE:MCOV.B) stock is a Hold with a SEK281.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Medicover AB stock, see the SE:MCOV.B Stock Forecast page.

More about Medicover AB

Medicover is a leading international healthcare and diagnostic services company, founded in 1995. It operates ambulatory clinics, hospitals, laboratories, and specialty-care facilities, with major markets in Poland, Germany, Romania, and India. In 2024, the company reported revenues of EUR 2,092 million and employed over 47,000 people.

Average Trading Volume: 84,532

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: SEK39.25B

data.title: Air Water Extends Tender Offer for Ci Medical Co., Ltd.
data.description:
The latest announcement is out from Air Water ( (JP:4088) ).

Air Water Inc. has announced an amendment to its tender offer for Ci Medical Co., Ltd., extending the offer period by 10 business days until October 6, 2025. This decision follows the Japan Fair Trade Commission’s notice that no exclusion order will be issued, allowing the tender offer to proceed without withdrawal, which could impact Air Water’s strategic positioning in the medical sector.

data.title: Techgen Metals Ltd. Releases 2025 Corporate Governance Statement
data.description:
The latest announcement is out from Techgen Metals Ltd. ( (AU:TG1) ).

Techgen Metals Ltd. has released its Corporate Governance Statement for the financial year ending June 30, 2025, detailing its adherence to the ASX Corporate Governance Council’s Principles and Recommendations. The company has adopted a Corporate Governance Plan and a Board Charter, which outline the roles and responsibilities of the Board, Chair, and management. Despite not having individual Board committees due to its current size and operations, the company believes the full Board’s experience is sufficient to handle these roles. This approach reflects Techgen Metals’ commitment to maintaining robust governance practices while optimizing resource utilization.

More about Techgen Metals Ltd.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

data.title: CEO Transfers Shares to Investment Company
data.description:
Wallenius Wilhelmsen ASA ( (DE:WNL) ) has shared an update.

Lasse Kristoffersen, CEO of Wallenius Wilhelmsen ASA, transferred his private holding of 28,100 shares to his investment company, B7 Invest AS, maintaining control of 33,100 shares in total. The transfer was executed at NOK 96.55 per share, reflecting the closing price on the Oslo Børs, with Kristoffersen fulfilling disclosure obligations under EU regulations.

data.title: Deterra Royalties Announces 2025 AGM Details
data.description:
Deterra Royalties Ltd ( (AU:DRR) ) just unveiled an update.

Deterra Royalties Limited has announced the details of its 2025 Annual General Meeting (AGM), scheduled for October 23, 2025, in Perth, Western Australia. The meeting will be held physically, with provisions for shareholders to view a webcast, although they will not be able to vote or ask questions online. Shareholders are encouraged to submit questions in advance and use proxy voting if unable to attend. This announcement underscores Deterra’s commitment to maintaining transparent communication with its stakeholders and adapting to modern communication methods.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:DRR) stock is a Hold with a A$4.25 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Deterra Royalties Ltd stock, see the AU:DRR Stock Forecast page.

More about Deterra Royalties Ltd

Deterra Royalties Limited operates in the mining industry, focusing on the management and acquisition of royalty interests. The company primarily deals with royalties related to mineral resources, providing a stream of income from mining operations without directly engaging in mining activities.

Average Trading Volume: 1,497,161

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: A$2.18B
